issues.description: The orchestrator reported a 'partial_gate_abort'. The test-orchestrator failed to collect tests (ERROR collecting tests/unit/fixture/test_manifest), resulting in an absent test signal.
issues.suggestion: Ensure that the test suite is runnable and that the test collection process does not encounter errors. The current error suggests a potential issue with the test discovery or the test file structure itself.
